name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cubed bread crumbs (white and WW mix)
1 1/2 tsp salad herbs (parsley and marjoram mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove mushroom stems from 20 large white mushrooms (about 2 inches diameter). Chop the stems and set aside.
2. Bring a pot of water to boil and add the mushrooms. Cook for a couple minutes or until they start to shrink slightly. Drain and place the mushrooms in cold water for one minute to stop further cooking. Drain again.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In a large non-stick sauté pan, cook the onion, mushroom stems, garlic, and celery in wine until the vegetables are tender.
5. Add shredded carrot and salad herbs. Cook until the carrot is softened.
6. Add bread crumbs and mix well with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Fill each mushroom cap with about a heaping tablespoon of the mixture.
8. Place the stuffed mushrooms on a lightly sprayed baking sheet.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the tops are lightly browned.
End of recipe.
